understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) by navigating a tile grid with gravity-based movement and clicks to remove obstacles.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal-only movement (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT) triggers automatic gravity fall until landing; CLICK removes breakable blocks (x); spikes (u/v) cause instant loss; gravity direction (DOWN here) dictates fall; UNDO reverts actions.
